## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` is clean
- [ ] If Python code changed, `python -m py_compile` on touched files succeeds
- [ ] If tokenizer logic changed in TS **or** Python, `scripts/check_tokenizer_parity.py` still passes
- [ ] Updated [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) under `Unreleased`
- [ ] Updated or added docs under [docs/](../docs)
